Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 160 upvotes, 12 comments
  2. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 24 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Unit: A self-replicating Forth mesh agent running in a browser tab 31 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 100 upvotes, 11 comments
  5. Agents of Chaos 99 upvotes, 12 comments
  6. Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution 110 upvotes, 14 comments
  7. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 301 upvotes, 59 comments
  8. Rock Star: Reading the Rosetta Stone 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 615 upvotes, 183 comments
  10. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 545 upvotes, 176 comments
  11. How to turn anything into a router 660 upvotes, 229 comments
  12. Do your own writing 500 upvotes, 180 comments
  13. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 273 upvotes, 101 comments
  14. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 36 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 187 upvotes, 77 comments
  16. Sony halts memory card shipments due to NAND shortage 39 upvotes, 11 comments
  17. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 300 upvotes, 135 comments
  18. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 401 upvotes, 199 comments
  19. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 48 upvotes, 17 comments
  20. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 83 upvotes, 39 comments
  21. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 124 upvotes, 64 comments
  22. Artemis II is not safe to fly 255 upvotes, 155 comments
  23. Bird brains (2023) 315 upvotes, 198 comments
  24. Vulnerability research is cooked 167 upvotes, 111 comments
  25. Good CTE, Bad CTE 9 upvotes, 2 comments
  26. Mr. Chatterbox is a Victorian-era ethically trained model 33 upvotes, 19 comments
  27. Android Developer Verification 236 upvotes, 224 comments
  28. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 15 upvotes, 9 comments
  29. Car Seats as Contraception 50 upvotes, 71 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 4:00pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
